.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(44, 56, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(44, 56, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 3.75px / 12.375px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #b57614 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#b57614, color-mix(in srgb, #b57614 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #b57614 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#b57614, color-mix(in srgb, #b57614 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(80, 73, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(80, 73, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(181, 118, 20) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(54, 69, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(44, 56, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(181, 118, 20, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(44, 56, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(44, 56, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(65, 83, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
